mission.title: Install and Configure Argo Rollouts (Argo) on Kubernetes
mission.description: Argo Rollouts is a Kubernetes controller that provides advanced deployment capabilities such as blue-green and canary deployments. Installing Argo Rollouts allows you to implement progressive delivery strategies, enhancing the reliability and control of your application updates.

steps.title: Create the Argo Rollouts namespace
steps.description:
Create a dedicated namespace for Argo Rollouts to operate in. This helps in organizing resources and managing permissions effectively.
```bash
kubectl create namespace argo-rollouts
```

steps.title: Install Argo Rollouts using Helm
steps.description:
Add the Argo Rollouts Helm repository and install the chart with a specific version.
```bash
helm repo add argo https://argoproj.github.io/argo-helm
helm repo update
helm install argo-rollouts argo/argo-rollouts --version 1.8.4 --namespace argo-rollouts --create-namespace
```

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
Check if the Argo Rollouts controller pod is running in the namespace you created.
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts
```

steps.title: Configure RBAC for Argo Rollouts
steps.description:
Apply the necessary Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) settings to ensure that the Argo Rollouts can manage resources effectively.
```bash
kubectl apply -n argo-rollouts -f https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/releases/latest/download/namespace-install.yaml
```

steps.title: Access the Argo Rollouts dashboard
steps.description:
Port-forward the Argo Rollouts dashboard service to access it locally.
```bash
kubectl port-forward svc/argo-rollouts-dashboard -n argo-rollouts 8080:80
```

resolution.summary: A successful installation will have the Argo Rollouts controller running in the 'argo-rollouts' namespace, and you will be able to access the dashboard at http://localhost:8080. You can also verify that the necessary RBAC permissions are applied.
codeSnippets:
helm repo add argo https://argoproj.github.io/argo-helm
helm repo update
helm install argo-rollouts argo/argo-rollouts --version 1.8.4 --namespace argo-rollouts --create-namespace

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have a Kubernetes cluster running version 1.24 or higher and have Helm and kubectl installed on your local machine.
